classifications.label: GHOST
classifications.note: The update helper rejects keys outside the explicit allowlist before setting attributes.

classifications.label: REAL
classifications.note: The parser returns an empty patch when the payload omits the patch key, which can hide caller bugs.
classifications.remediation: Require the patch key explicitly and fail closed when it is absent.

spec_mutations: Specify that profile update payloads must include a patch object.
decision_rationale: The arbitrary-mutation concern is contradicted by code; the missing-patch risk has a direct remediation.
